- Type: Time (Minutes)

- Description: ERA/Butterfly Effect Club → BEC tree issuance (95 trees minted + sold, end-to-end)

  Details:
  Stood up the full ERA Professionals / Butterfly Effect Club tree-issuance pipeline and a reusable 'attestation → tree planting' template. Created the BEC managed ledger (sheet + Currencies row + Shipment Ledger Listing registration + treasury-cache JSON). Extended the donation-mint GAS: dynamic Currencies-tab currency validation (dropped the hardcoded allowlist), per-row landing_page override, and mint->managed-ledger accounting; deployed as admin@truesight.me and repointed the dao_protocol donation-mint webhook off the deprecated 1slQVojn script to the live 1MnAsIQA deployment. Built the link_attestations_to_trees orchestrator + mint_donation --landing-page/optional-email; minted 95 cohort tree QRs (qr_code==pk_hash, landing_page==profile_url, holder=Gary Teh) and sold them at $1 (proceeds to Gary Teh); $2 capital injection for the 2 unattested processed. Surfaced on truesight.me (/sunmint/bec redirect, sunmint.html BEC card, serialized listing refresh, /qr broken-farm-link fix). Documented the full battle-tested runbook in PROGRAM_PARTNER_ONBOARDING.md and ERA_COHORT_TREE_ISSUANCE_PLAN.md.
